title: Trauma Care: Intensive Care in Bannerghatta Road
heading: Vijayashree Hospitals
description: Vijayashree Hospital is a multispecialty hospital that offers a wide range of services, including trauma care, intensive care in Bannerghatta Road
text: Trauma Care: Intensive Care in Bannerghatta Road Skip to content Vijayashree hospitals 080-4906 8899 080-4906 8888 vijayashreehospitals@gmail.com Home About Us Departments General Medicine General & Laparoscopy Surgery Orthopaedics Dermatology Obstetrics & Gynaecology Cardiology Paediatrics Urology Neurology Neuro Surgery Hematology ENT Radiology Anaesthesiology Nephrology Oral & Maxillofacial Surgery Dental Physiotherapy IVF Psychiatry Vascular Surgery Plastic Surgery & Cosmetology Doctors Health Packages Insurance Partners Facilities Gallery Contact Us X BOOK APPOINTMENT slider1 slider2 slider3 slider4 slider5 Vijayashree Hospitals Vijayashree Hospitals at Bannerghatta Main Road, Gottigere was established in September 2011. The hospital has 50 beds and is a multispecialty and super-specialty centre. Surgical, Orthopaedics, maternity, and paediatric services are its highlights. Other departments include radiology & imaging, which help to provide trauma care and intensive care. A dedicated physiotherapy unit for rehabilitation is outstanding. It also has a dental department, an endoscopy unit, a dialysis unit, a pharmacy open 24×7 hours, laboratory services, and an ICU(Intensive care unit)-equipped ambulance. All medical insurances are empanelled with our Hospital. Likewise, various industries, schools, colleges, construction companies, and old-age homes have tied up with our hospital. Don't go by other comments or words. The care vijayashree hospital provides is just beautiful... Rajath Rao V My Mom had hand surgery in the Major OT, overall experience was very good,staff and especially Doctors Dr Vijay and Dr Prashanth diagnosis and treatment was excellent.I recommend this hospital for every one. They are very reasonable in medical charges.Thanks a lot for the doctors,staff and everyone for taking care of my mom Prashanth N Very nice experience while getting the covid vaccination done here. Staff explained me the process briefly and helped me with the post vaccination steps and precautions.  It is a spacious and hygienic location and proper social distancing maintained. Happy with the hospital service Smitha Ashwini We had admitted my father to the Vijayshree hospital gottigere due to his critical health condition. But, Now he is perfectly alright, all credits goes to the Vijayshree hospital and team. And the helping hands Dr Krishna , Mr Nagraj , and Few sisters and doctors in the ICU incharge. Amazing hygiene Maintained. overall thanks a lot to the entire staffs over in the Hospital. Kushala L Had a great experience at vijayashree hospitals gottigere bannerghatta road. Treated very well by a great team of doctors. The entire process was seamless right from admission, to care taking by the great nursing team and everyone else involved. Would highly recommended. Have been visiting this hospital for over 7 years for any health issues seen within our family Swathi Kushi Very good experience & response from the staff and doctors. We had a very comfortable stay. Dr Vijay b nagaraj sir was the one who filled all braveness & boldness to my mom which made her to get comfort with the treatment, overall everything was good at here.This is the best hospital in Bangalore. Thanks for vijayashree hospitals. Nagendra K Information Vijayashree Hospitals at Bannerghatta Main Road, Gottigere was established in September 2011.
